name: 旅游场景
desc: 基于 Oxford 3000 高频词表筛选 + 旅游专项短语，共 1000 词，覆盖机场、酒店、餐厅、问路、购物等场景

words.chinese: 印, 邮票, 打印器
岛, 岛屿, 孤立地
床, 睡眠处, 河床
碗, 木球, 大酒杯
糖, 糖块, 甜言蜜
碟, 盘子, 盆中物
不, 拒绝, 否决票
匙, 调羹, 匙形工
秒, 瞬间, 第二名
油, 石油, 油画颜
拿, 取, 抓, 带

words.example: Please show your boarding pass at the gate.
words.example_cn: 请在登机口出示您的登机牌。

words.example: Carry-on baggage must fit in the overhead bin.
words.example_cn: 随身行李必须能放入头顶行李架。

words.example: There is a fee for checked baggage over 23kg.
words.example_cn: 超过23公斤的托运行李需要收费。

words.example: Please proceed to baggage claim area 3.
words.example_cn: 请前往第三号行李认领处。

words.example: You can buy perfume at the duty-free shop.
words.example_cn: 你可以在免税店购买香水。

words.example: My connecting flight departs in two hours.
words.example_cn: 我的转机航班两小时后起飞。

words.example: I prefer a window seat on long flights.
words.example_cn: 长途飞行我更喜欢靠窗座位。

words.example: Can I have an aisle seat, please?
words.example_cn: 请问我可以要靠过道的座位吗？

words.example: Please place your bag in the overhead bin.
words.example_cn: 请将您的包放入头顶行李架。

words.example: Please remove your shoes for the security check.
words.example_cn: 安全检查时请脱下鞋子。

words.example: The baggage allowance is 20 kilograms.
What is your flight number?
Please wait in the departure lounge.
Please fill in the entry card before landing.

words.example: I'm suffering from jet lag after my long flight.

words.example: Please queue at passport control.
I'd like to book a round trip ticket.

words.example: Is this a one-way ticket or round trip?
words.example_cn: 这是单程票还是往返票？

words.example: Only one piece of hand luggage is allowed.

Check-out time is 12 noon.

words.example: Drinks from the minibar will be charged.
words.example_cn: 迷你吧里的饮品需要收费。

words.example: Complimentary breakfast is served from 7 to 10.

Please take me to the emergency room.

My wallet has been stolen.

I need my allergy medication.

The doctor asked about my medical history.
My blood type is O positive.

Please fasten your seat belt.
Please close the overhead compartment.
